title: fNIRS Finger Tapping
description: This fNIRS dataset demonstrates BIDS-compliant formatting for functional near-infrared spectroscopy neuroimaging data. It contains measurements from 5 participants performing a motor task involving finger tapping of the left or right hand, with control conditions, while hemodynamic responses were recorded from sensors positioned over the motor cortex. The dataset serves as a reference implementation for the fNIRS BIDS specification and includes short-channel measurements for physiological noise correction.
methods_description: Participants performed finger tapping tasks (left thumb to fingers, right thumb to fingers, or control) lasting 5 seconds each, cued by auditory stimuli. fNIRS sensors were positioned over the motor cortex with short channels attached to the scalp. Data were acquired using a NIRx device and converted to BIDS format using MNE-BIDS.
